"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.98, 0.97, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(56)
        padding: dp(16), 0
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size
        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(20)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(16)
                    spacing: dp(12)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        padding: dp(12)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 开始对比按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 进度
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(40)
                        font_size: dp(14)
                        color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(8)

                    # ASR设置
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: 'ASR服务:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: asr_spinner
                            text: '百度语音(内置)'
                            values: ['百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

        Screen:
            name: 'result'
            BoxLayout:
                orientation: 'vertical'
                padding: dp(12)
                spacing: dp(8)

                # 摘要
                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''

ASR_MAP = {
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('baidu_builtin')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

name: Build Android APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '17'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install buildozer cython kivy
          sudo apt-get install -y autoconf automake libtool pkg-config

      - name: Build APK
        run: |
          buildozer android debug
        timeout-minutes: 60

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: voicedoccompare-apk
          path: bin/*.apk

# 配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版

## 功能
- 从微信聊天记录直接导入录音和文档（通过分享功能）
- 语音转文字（百度ASR内置/Groq Whisper/OpenAI Whisper）
- 智能文本对比（jieba分词 + 拼音同音字识别 + 数字规范化）
- 差异标注（误读/漏读/多读 + 时间戳定位）

## 微信导入方式
1. 打开微信聊天窗口
2. 长按录音/文档文件
3. 点击"分享" → 选择"配音文字核对宝"
4. 文件自动导入APP

## 项目结构
```
app/
  main.py              # Kivy主程序 + UI
  core/
    compare.py         # 核心对比算法
    transcribe.py      # 语音转录（多ASR引擎）
    docx_util.py       # Word文档解析
    wechat_import.py   # 微信Share Intent文件导入
buildozer.spec         # Android构建配置
intent_filters.xml     # Share Intent声明
build_apk.py           # 构建辅助脚本
```

## 构建APK

### 方式一：本地构建（需要Linux/WSL）
```bash
pip install buildozer cython kivy
buildozer android debug
```

### 方式二：GitHub Actions
推送到GitHub后自动构建，在Actions页面下载APK。

## 核心算法
移植自桌面版 VoiceDocCompare，包含：
- **SequenceMatcher序列比对** - 基于jieba分词的词级差异检测
- **拼音同音字识别** - pypinyin比较，避免同音字误报
- **数字读音规范化** - 阿拉伯数字↔中文数字统一比较
- **填充词过滤** - 自动忽略"嗯""啊"等口语填充词
- **SILK音频解码** - 支持微信.amr/.silk语音格式

        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: voicedoccompare-apk
          path: bin/*.apk

toolUseResult.content:
# 配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版

## 功能
- 从微信聊天记录直接导入录音和文档（通过分享功能）
- 语音转文字（百度ASR内置/Groq Whisper/OpenAI Whisper）
- 智能文本对比（jieba分词 + 拼音同音字识别 + 数字规范化）
- 差异标注（误读/漏读/多读 + 时间戳定位）

## 微信导入方式
1. 打开微信聊天窗口
2. 长按录音/文档文件
3. 点击"分享" → 选择"配音文字核对宝"
4. 文件自动导入APP

## 项目结构
```
app/
  main.py              # Kivy主程序 + UI
  core/
    compare.py         # 核心对比算法
    transcribe.py      # 语音转录（多ASR引擎）
    docx_util.py       # Word文档解析
    wechat_import.py   # 微信Share Intent文件导入
buildozer.spec         # Android构建配置
intent_filters.xml     # Share Intent声明
build_apk.py           # 构建辅助脚本
```

## 构建APK

### 方式一：本地构建（需要Linux/WSL）
```bash
pip install buildozer cython kivy
buildozer android debug
```

### 方式二：GitHub Actions
推送到GitHub后自动构建，在Actions页面下载APK。

## 核心算法
移植自桌面版 VoiceDocCompare，包含：
- **SequenceMatcher序列比对** - 基于jieba分词的词级差异检测
- **拼音同音字识别** - pypinyin比较，避免同音字误报
- **数字读音规范化** - 阿拉伯数字↔中文数字统一比较
- **填充词过滤** - 自动忽略"嗯""啊"等口语填充词
- **SILK音频解码** - 支持微信.amr/.silk语音格式

content.text:
项目已创建完成。以下是完整总结：

---

## 研究结果 + APK项目总结

### 一、GitHub排名前列的微信导出项目

| 星数 | 项目 | 方案 |
|------|------|------|
| 40541★ | LC044/WeChatMsg | PC端解密微信数据库，需root |
| 7639★ | BlueMatthew/WechatExporter | C++跨平台导出，需iTunes备份 |
| 3750★ | SuxueCode/WechatBakTool | C#解密PC版微信 |
| 3312★ | hicc77/WeFlow | 本地导出+年度报告 |
| 218★ | ketn4391/android_silk_v3_decoder | SILK v3音频解码器 |

### 二、最优方案选择

**放弃数据库解密方案**（需root，用户体验差），采用 **Android Share Intent**：
- 用户在微信长按文件 → 分享 → 选择我们的APP
- 零权限、无需root、微信原生支持
- 这是WPS、百度网盘等主流APP的标准做法

### 三、APK项目结构（`D:\apk核对宝`）

```
app/
  main.py                 # Kivy主程序（UI + 业务逻辑）
  core/
    compare.py            # 核心对比算法（移植自桌面版）
    transcribe.py         # 语音转录（百度/Groq/OpenAI + SILK解码）
    docx_util.py          # Word文档解析（含无依赖备用方案）
    wechat_import.py      # 微信Share Intent文件接收
buildozer.spec            # Buildozer构建配置
intent_filters.xml        # Android Intent声明（接收音频+文档）
build_apk.py              # 构建辅助脚本
.github/workflows/build.yml  # GitHub Actions自动构建
```

### 四、核心算法（从桌面版移植）

1. **jieba分词 + SequenceMatcher** 序列比对
2. **pypinyin同音字识别**（他/她不算差异）
3. **数字读音规范化**（2023年→二零二三年，15→十五）
4. **填充词过滤**（嗯、啊、那个等自动忽略）
5. **SILK/AMR音频解码**（微信语音格式→WAV）
6. **长音频分段转录**（>55秒自动切分）

### 五、构建APK

需要Linux/WSL环境：
```bash
cd /mnt/d/apk核对宝
pip install buildozer cython kivy
buildozer android debug
```
或推送到GitHub，通过Actions自动构建。

message.content: 手机没有vpn，如何使用funasr

content.text:
没有VPN意味着无法访问Groq/OpenAI等国外API，FunASR是纯本地/国内方案，非常适合。有两种方式在手机上用FunASR：

## 方案一：手机连电脑的FunASR服务（推荐）

手机和电脑在同一局域网，手机调用电脑上已有的FunASR服务：

1. 电脑启动FunASR服务（你已经装好了）
2. 手机通过局域网IP访问

我来改代码支持这个方案。

content.content:
1→"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
     2→import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
     3→import requests
     4→from typing import Optional, Callable
     5→
     6→
     7→def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
     8→    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
     9→    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    10→    """
    11→    if output_path is None:
    12→        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'
    13→
    14→    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    15→    try:
    16→        subprocess.run([
    17→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
    18→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
    19→            output_path
    20→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
    21→        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
    22→            return output_path
    23→    except:
    24→        pass
    25→
    26→    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    27→    try:
    28→        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
    29→                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    30→        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
    31→        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
    32→            subprocess.run([
    33→                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
    34→                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
    35→            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    36→            os.remove(pcm_path)
    37→            if os.path.exists(output_path):
    38→                return output_path
    39→    except:
    40→        pass
    41→
    42→    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理
    43→
    44→
    45→def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    46→    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    47→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    48→
    49→    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    50→    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
    51→        if progress_cb:
    52→            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
    53→        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
    54→        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)
    55→
    56→    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    57→    if progress_cb:
    58→        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    59→    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    60→    try:
    61→        subprocess.run([
    62→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
    63→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
    64→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
    65→        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
    66→            return out
    67→    except:
    68→        pass
    69→    return filepath
    70→
    71→
    72→def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    73→    """百度语音识别API"""
    74→    if progress_cb:
    75→        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')
    76→
    77→    # 获取token
    78→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
    79→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    80→    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    81→    if not token:
    82→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
    83→
    84→    # 读取音频
    85→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
    86→        audio_data = f.read()
    87→
    88→    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
    89→        # 长音频分段处理
    90→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)
    91→
    92→    if progress_cb:
    93→        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')
    94→
    95→    payload = {
    96→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
    97→        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
    98→        'token': token,
    99→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   100→        'len': len(audio_data),
   101→        'dev_pid': 1537
   102→    }
   103→    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
   104→    result = resp.json()
   105→    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   106→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   107→    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')
   108→
   109→
   110→def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
   111→    """长音频分段百度识别"""
   112→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   113→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   114→    subprocess.run([
   115→        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
   116→        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
   117→    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
   118→
   119→    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   120→    if not chunks:
   121→        raise Exception('音频分段失败')
   122→
   123→    results = []
   124→    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
   125→        if progress_cb:
   126→            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
   127→        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
   128→            audio_data = f.read()
   129→        payload = {
   130→            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   131→            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
   132→            'token': token,
   133→            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   134→            'len': len(audio_data),
   135→            'dev_pid': 1537
   136→        }
   137→        try:
   138→            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
   139→            r = resp.json()
   140→            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   141→                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
   142→        except:
   143→            pass
   144→        os.remove(chunk)
   145→    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   146→    return ''.join(results)
   147→
   148→
   149→def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
   150→    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
   151→    if progress_cb:
   152→        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
   153→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   154→        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   155→            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
   156→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   157→            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   158→                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   159→            timeout=180)
   160→    data = resp.json()
   161→    if 'text' not in data:
   162→        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')
   163→
   164→    text = data['text']
   165→    words = []
   166→    if 'words' in data:
   167→        for w in data['words']:
   168→            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
   169→    return text, words or None
   170→
   171→
   172→def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
   173→    """统一转录入口"""
   174→    keys = keys or {}
   175→    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)
   176→
   177→    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
   178→        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
   179→        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
   180→        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
   181→        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
   182→        return text, None
   183→
   184→    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
   185→        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)
   186→
   187→    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
   188→        if progress_cb:
   189→            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
   190→        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   191→            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   192→                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
   193→                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   194→                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   195→                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   196→                timeout=120)
   197→        data = resp.json()
   198→        text = data.get('text', '')
   199→        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
   200→                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
   201→        return text, words
   202→
   203→    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')
   204→

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'

            Color:

                pos: self.pos

            font_size: dp(20)

            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)

                        canvas.before:

                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1

                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]

                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'

                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件

                spacing: dp(8)

                # 摘要
                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''

ASR_MAP = {
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('baidu_builtin')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:

            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(56)
        padding: dp(16), 0
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size
        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(20)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(16)
                    spacing: dp(12)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        padding: dp(12)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)

                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:

                            font_size: dp(13)

                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 开始对比按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 进度
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(40)
                        font_size: dp(14)
                        color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100

                    # ASR设置
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None

                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: asr_spinner
                            text: '百度语音(内置)'
                            values: ['百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

        Screen:
            name: 'result'
            BoxLayout:
                orientation: 'vertical'
                padding: dp(12)
                spacing: dp(8)

                # 摘要
                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None

                    height: dp(48)

                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)

    VoiceDocApp().run()

content.text:
手机不在局域网的话，FunASR远程调用就不行了。那就需要**在手机上直接运行FunASR模型**。有两个可行方案：

## 方案分析

| 方案 | 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|------|
| **Sherpa-ONNX（推荐）** | 纯本地离线、支持Android NDK、模型小(50-80MB)、中文识别好 | 首次需下载模型 |
| **百度语音(内置)** | 已实现、无需额外配置 | 需要网络、有60秒限制 |
| **FunASR直接跑在手机** | 和桌面版一致 | 模型太大(1GB+)、手机内存不够 |

**Sherpa-ONNX** 是最佳选择 —— 它是新一代开源离线语音识别引擎，专门为移动端优化，支持FunASR的Paraformer模型，纯本地运行，不需要网络。

让我加上这个方案。

content: 安卓手机出远门

input.old_string: def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
input.new_string:
def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
    """
    try:
        import sherpa_onnx
    except ImportError:
        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')

    if model_dir is None:
        # 默认模型路径
        from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
        if kv_platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        else:
            model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
        raise Exception(f'模型文件不存在: {model_path}\n'
                        '请先下载Paraformer模型到该目录')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')

    # 读取音频
    import wave
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())

    import struct
    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)

    text = stream.result.text.strip()
    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
    words = None
    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
        words = []
        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps

"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
import requests
from typing import Optional, Callable


def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    """
    if output_path is None:
        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'

    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
            output_path
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
            return output_path
    except:
        pass

    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
            subprocess.run([
                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
            os.remove(pcm_path)
            if os.path.exists(output_path):
                return output_path
    except:
        pass

    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理


def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()

    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)

    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
            return out
    except:
        pass
    return filepath


def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    """百度语音识别API"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')

    # 获取token
    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    # 读取音频
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
        # 长音频分段处理
        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')

    payload = {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
        'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data),
        'dev_pid': 1537
    }
    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
    result = resp.json()
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')


def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
    """长音频分段百度识别"""
    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
    subprocess.run([
        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)

    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
    if not chunks:
        raise Exception('音频分段失败')

    results = []
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
            audio_data = f.read()
        payload = {
            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
            'token': token,
            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
            'len': len(audio_data),
            'dev_pid': 1537
        }
        try:
            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
            r = resp.json()
            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
        except:
            pass
        os.remove(chunk)
    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
    return ''.join(results)


def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
            timeout=180)
    data = resp.json()
    if 'text' not in data:
        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')

    text = data['text']
    words = []
    if 'words' in data:
        for w in data['words']:
            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
    return text, words or None

def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765
    """
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在连接FunASR服务...')

    # 先检查服务是否可用
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'{server_url}/health', timeout=3)
        if r.status_code != 200:
            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
        raise Exception(f'无法连接FunASR服务 ({server_url})\n请确认：\n1. 电脑已启动FunASR服务\n2. 手机和电脑在同一WiFi\n3. IP地址正确')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在上传音频到FunASR...')

    # 上传音频文件进行转录
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe_file',
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)},
            timeout=600)

    # 如果服务端不支持文件上传，回退到路径模式（同机调试用）
    if resp.status_code == 404:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe',
            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)

    data = resp.json()
    if not data.get('success'):
        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))

    text = data.get('text', '')
    timestamps = data.get('timestamp')
    words = None

    if timestamps and len(timestamps) > 0:
        # 将字符级时间戳转为词级（简单按字切分）
        words = []
        for i, ch in enumerate(text):
            if ch.strip() and i < len(timestamps):
                ts = timestamps[i]
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': ts[0] / 1000, 'end': ts[1] / 1000, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
    """统一转录入口"""
    keys = keys or {}
    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'funasr':
        server_url = keys.get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        return transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb)

    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
        return text, None

    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)

    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
                timeout=120)
        data = resp.json()
        text = data.get('text', '')
        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
        return text, words

    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:

            radius: [dp(6)]

        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)

        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''

ASR_MAP = {
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('funasr')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()
