ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('funasr')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

else:

from kivy.app import App

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:

                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        padding: dp(12)
                        canvas.before:

                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 开始对比按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 进度
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(40)

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress

                        size_hint_y: None

                    # ASR设置
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None

                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: 'ASR服务:'

                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: asr_spinner
                            text: '离线识别(无需网络)'
                            values: ['离线识别(无需网络)', 'FunASR(局域网)', '百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

                    # FunASR服务器地址
                    BoxLayout:
                        id: funasr_box
                        size_hint_y: None

                            font_size: dp(14)

                            halign: 'right'

                            valign: 'center'

                            hint_text: '如 192.168.1.100'
                            size_hint_x: 0.75

                            multiline: False
                            on_text_validate: app.save_funasr_ip(self.text)

        Screen:
            name: 'result'

                # 摘要

                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''

ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'baidu_builtin')
        self._save_config()

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'

    spacing: dp(2)

            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1

'''

ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'baidu_builtin')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

input.content:
"""FunASR服务端补丁 - 添加文件上传接口，供手机远程调用

使用方法：在电脑上运行此脚本，手机通过WiFi连接即可调用
    python funasr_server_patch.py

或者将 /transcribe_file 路由添加到已有的 FunASR server.py 中
"""
import os, sys, tempfile
from flask import Flask, request, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

# 复用已有的FunASR服务
FUNASR_URL = 'http://localhost:8765'


@app.route('/health')
def health():
    return jsonify({'status': 'ok'})


@app.route('/transcribe_file', methods=['POST'])
def transcribe_file():
    """接收手机上传的音频文件并转录"""
    if 'file' not in request.files:
        return jsonify({'success': False, 'error': '未收到文件'}), 400

    f = request.files['file']
    # 保存到临时文件
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix='_' + f.filename, delete=False)
    f.save(tmp.name)
    tmp.close()

    try:
        import requests as req
        # 转发给本地FunASR服务
        resp = req.post(f'{FUNASR_URL}/transcribe',
                        json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(tmp.name)}, timeout=600)
        return jsonify(resp.json())
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}), 500
    finally:
        try:
            os.remove(tmp.name)
        except:
            pass


@app.route('/transcribe', methods=['POST'])
def transcribe_proxy():
    """代理转发到FunASR"""
    import requests as req
    data = request.get_json()
    resp = req.post(f'{FUNASR_URL}/transcribe', json=data, timeout=600)
    return jsonify(resp.json())


if __name__ == '__main__':
    import socket
    hostname = socket.gethostname()
    local_ip = socket.gethostbyname(hostname)
    print(f'FunASR文件上传代理已启动')
    print(f'手机请连接: http://{local_ip}:8766')
    print(f'确保电脑FunASR服务已在 {FUNASR_URL} 运行')
    app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=8766, debug=False)

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.98, 0.97, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None

        canvas.before:

                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size
        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(20)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(16)
                    spacing: dp(12)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        padding: dp(12)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 开始对比按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 进度
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(40)
                        font_size: dp(14)
                        color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(8)

                    # ASR设置
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: 'ASR服务:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: asr_spinner
                            text: '离线识别(无需网络)'
                            values: ['离线识别(无需网络)', 'FunASR(局域网)', '百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

                    # FunASR服务器地址
                    BoxLayout:
                        id: funasr_box
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: '电脑IP:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        TextInput:
                            id: funasr_ip
                            text: app.funasr_server
                            hint_text: '如 192.168.1.100'
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            multiline: False
                            on_text_validate: app.save_funasr_ip(self.text)

        Screen:
            name: 'result'
            BoxLayout:
                orientation: 'vertical'
                padding: dp(12)
                spacing: dp(8)

                # 摘要
                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''

ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            # FunASR需要server_url
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''

    orientation: 'vertical'

    canvas.before:

ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        # 检查离线模型
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model(), 2)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            # FunASR需要server_url
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
import requests
from typing import Optional, Callable


def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    """
    if output_path is None:
        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'

    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
            output_path
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
            return output_path
    except:
        pass

    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
            subprocess.run([
                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
            os.remove(pcm_path)
            if os.path.exists(output_path):
                return output_path
    except:
        pass

    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理


def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()

    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)

    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
            return out
    except:
        pass
    return filepath


def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    """百度语音识别API"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')

    # 获取token
    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    # 读取音频
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
        # 长音频分段处理
        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')

    payload = {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
        'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data),
        'dev_pid': 1537
    }
    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
    result = resp.json()
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')


def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
    """长音频分段百度识别"""
    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
    subprocess.run([
        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)

    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
    if not chunks:
        raise Exception('音频分段失败')

    results = []
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
            audio_data = f.read()
        payload = {
            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
            'token': token,
            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
            'len': len(audio_data),
            'dev_pid': 1537
        }
        try:
            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
            r = resp.json()
            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
        except:
            pass
        os.remove(chunk)
    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
    return ''.join(results)


def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
            timeout=180)
    data = resp.json()
    if 'text' not in data:
        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')

    text = data['text']
    words = []
    if 'words' in data:
        for w in data['words']:
            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
    return text, words or None


def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
    """
    try:
        import sherpa_onnx
    except ImportError:
        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')

    if model_dir is None:
        # 默认模型路径
        from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
        if kv_platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        else:
            model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
        raise Exception(f'模型文件不存在: {model_path}\n'
                        '请先下载Paraformer模型到该目录')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')

    # 读取音频
    import wave
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())

    import struct
    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)

    text = stream.result.text.strip()
    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
    words = None
    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
        words = []
        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
            if i < len(ts_list):
                start = ts_list[i]
                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def _download_paraformer_model(dest_dir, progress_cb=None):
    """下载Paraformer离线模型（约50MB）"""
    import tarfile, io
    url = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
    # 国内镜像
    mirror_url = 'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'

    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在下载离线识别模型(约50MB)...')

    for u in [mirror_url, url]:
        try:
            resp = requests.get(u, stream=True, timeout=30)
            resp.raise_for_status()
            data = io.BytesIO()
            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
            downloaded = 0
            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
                data.write(chunk)
                downloaded += len(chunk)
                if progress_cb and total:
                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
                    progress_cb(f'下载模型: {pct}% ({downloaded//1024//1024}MB)')
            data.seek(0)
            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
                tar.extractall(dest_dir)
            if progress_cb:
                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
            return True
        except:
            continue
    raise Exception('模型下载失败，请手动下载')


def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765
    """
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在连接FunASR服务...')

    # 先检查服务是否可用
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'{server_url}/health', timeout=3)
        if r.status_code != 200:
            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
        raise Exception(f'无法连接FunASR服务 ({server_url})\n请确认：\n1. 电脑已启动FunASR服务\n2. 手机和电脑在同一WiFi\n3. IP地址正确')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在上传音频到FunASR...')

    # 上传音频文件进行转录
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe_file',
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)},
            timeout=600)

    # 如果服务端不支持文件上传，回退到路径模式（同机调试用）
    if resp.status_code == 404:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe',
            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)

    data = resp.json()
    if not data.get('success'):
        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))

    text = data.get('text', '')
    timestamps = data.get('timestamp')
    words = None

    if timestamps and len(timestamps) > 0:
        # 将字符级时间戳转为词级（简单按字切分）
        words = []
        for i, ch in enumerate(text):
            if ch.strip() and i < len(timestamps):
                ts = timestamps[i]
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': ts[0] / 1000, 'end': ts[1] / 1000, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
    """统一转录入口"""
    keys = keys or {}
    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'sherpa_offline':
        model_dir = keys.get('model_dir')
        return transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'funasr':
        server_url = keys.get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        return transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb)

    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
        return text, None

    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)

    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
                timeout=120)
        data = resp.json()
        text = data.get('text', '')
        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
        return text, words

    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')

import requests, time

urls = [
    ('HuggingFace镜像', 'https://hf-mirror.com/csukuangfj/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14/resolve/main/model.int8.onnx'),
    ('ModelScope', 'https://modelscope.cn/api/v1/models/csukuangfj/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14/repo?Revision=master&FilePath=model.int8.onnx'),
    ('ghfast', 'https://ghfast.top/https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2'),
    ('ghproxy', 'https://ghproxy.net/https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2'),
    ('kkgithub', 'https://kkgithub.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2'),
    ('GitHubDirect', 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2'),
]

for name, url in urls:
    try:
        t0 = time.time()
        r = requests.get(url, stream=True, timeout=8, allow_redirects=True)
        downloaded = 0
        for chunk in r.iter_content(8192):
            downloaded += len(chunk)
            if downloaded >= 131072:
                break
        elapsed = time.time() - t0
        speed = downloaded / elapsed / 1024
        print(f'{name:20s} | {speed:8.1f} KB/s | OK')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'{name:20s} | FAILED: {str(e)[:40]}')
" 2>&1

cd "D:/apk核对宝/app/models/paraformer" && rm -f model.int8.onnx tokens.txt 2>/dev/null; python -c "
import requests, sys

# GitHub直连最快
base = 'https://huggingface.co/csukuangfj/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14/resolve/main'
files = ['model.int8.onnx', 'tokens.txt']

for fname in files:
    url = f'{base}/{fname}'
    print(f'下载 {fname} ...')
    r = requests.get(url, stream=True, timeout=300)
    r.raise_for_status()
    total = int(r.headers.get('content-length', 0))
    downloaded = 0
    with open(fname, 'wb') as f:
        for chunk in r.iter_content(131072):
            f.write(chunk)
            downloaded += len(chunk)
            if total:
                pct = downloaded * 100 // total
                mb = downloaded // 1024 // 1024
                sys.stdout.write(f'\r  {fname}: {pct}% ({mb}/{total//1024//1024}MB)')
                sys.stdout.flush()
    print(f'\n  {fname} OK ({downloaded//1024}KB)')
print('ALL DONE')
" 2>&1
